params.name: In Search of Lost Time
params.description: In Search of Lost Time is a representative work by French writer Marcel Proust. Through the form of reminiscence, Proust reviews past events, covering childhood memories, family life, first love and heartbreak, observations of historical events, insights into art, and understanding of time and space. Time plays the role of the protagonist inThis work, and Proust, through wisdom and imagination, makes time concrete, vivid, and perfect, like a symphony composed of various themes, yet on a macro le …
